DP.024.0000:
Why don’t you try dressing up your
Pokémon now?\f
We have a Fitting Room on
the second floor.\f
Dress up your Pokémon nicely with
Accessories!
DP.024.0004:
This is the Pokémon Lottery Corner.\f
If your drawn number matches the
ID No. of any of your Pokémon,\f
starting with the far right digit,
you will receive a fabulous gift.\f
Would you like to draw a Pokémon
Loto Ticket?
DP.024.0005:
You’ve already drawn a Loto Ticket
today. Please come back tomorrow.
DP.024.0006:
Oh. I see.
Please do visit us again.
DP.024.0008:
Your Loto Ticket number is [0136,0000].\f
Now, let’s see if it matches the
ID No. of any of your Pokémon.\f
DP.024.0009:
Congratulations!\f
The ID No. of your team’s
[0101,0000] matches your Loto\r
Ticket number!\f
DP.024.0010:
Congratulations!\f
The ID No. of your PC-boxed
[0101,0000] matches your Loto\r
Ticket number!\f
DP.024.0011:
I’m sorry.
You didn’t get a match...
DP.024.0012:
The last digit matched, so you
win the fourth prize!\f
DP.024.0013:
You gained a new Backdrop for use
in Fitting Rooms.
DP.024.0014:
The last two digits matched, so you
win the third prize!\f
DP.024.0015:
The last three digits matched, so you
win the second prize!\f
DP.024.0016:
The last four digits matched, so you
win the first prize!\f
DP.024.0017:
Oh, my goodness, all five digits
matched!\f
You’ve won the jackpot prize!
This is just so incredible!\f
...Oh, I’m sorry! Your prize!
I got carried away there.\f
Here you go!\f
DP.024.0018:
...Oh?
You seem to have no room for this.\f
Please make room in your Bag and
then let me know.
DP.024.0019:
[0103,0000]?
Yes, I’ve been expecting you.\f
This is the prize we’ve been holding
for you. Here you go!
DP.024.0021:
They keep records of things like
how many battles you’ve won in a row,\r
or how many Pokémon you’ve caught.\f
You can check everyone’s records
up on the third floor.
DP.024.0022:
I’m going to get commercials shown
on TV.\f
They’ll attract more customers to
the department store.
DP.024.0023:
The Trainers that gather over there
are looking for battles.\f
That corner used to be for karaoke,
but now it’s all battling!
DP.024.0024:
More than singing!
More than dancing!\f
I love Pokémon!
So, shall we battle?
DP.024.0025:
I’ll let you join my fan club if you
can beat me!\f
DP.024.0026:
Aww... That’s heartbreaking...
I’m an Idol, too...
DP.024.0027:
Well, that’s me and my Pokémon!
I hope you’ll support us!\f
Just so you know, our latest single
is called “Jigglin’ Pokémon Wub!”
DP.024.0028:
I’m working on a story.
Can you battle me?
DP.024.0029: Join me for a live report!\f
DP.024.0030:
Press coverage denied...
But you’re so intriguing!
DP.024.0031:
Interviews are about taking the
initiative.
DP.024.0032:
I’ve spotted a charismatic Trainer!
Is it OK to go for the scoop?
DP.024.0033:
As a professional cameraman, I always
go for the best shot!\f
DP.024.0034:
That’s a downer...\f
I thought I’d found a Trainer and
Pokémon who’d shine on camera.
DP.024.0035:
The lively expressions on you and
your Pokémon’s faces...\f
It makes for some great TV!
DP.024.0036:
Are we all ready to have some fun?
I sure am! Aren’t you having fun?!\r
Let’s make it fun! OK?!
DP.024.0037:
OK, how shall we do this?
Shall we do something fantastical?\f
DP.024.0038:
Oh, how shall I say this...?
It makes me all lonely, I say...
DP.024.0039:
A clown’s makeup is a face that’s
crying while laughing.\f
It defines what we do!
DP.024.0040:
Two Pokémon! If you had two Pokémon,
we’d get a great shot here.
DP.024.0041:
Oh! You’re ready for a battle
with us?
DP.024.0042:
You’re live on camera, but try
to act natural, OK?\f
DP.024.0043:
OK, that’s how it is, huh.
Can’t do anything about that.
DP.024.0044:
I’d like to take that footage and
have it broadcast worldwide.
DP.024.0045:
Oh, no. What we really want to see
is you in action with two Pokémon!
DP.024.0046:
Giggle!
Will you have a battle with us?
DP.024.0047:
We’ll check you out thoroughly as
a Trainer!\f
DP.024.0048:
Oh, too bad!
I wanted to check out your Pokémon!
DP.024.0049:
I lost but I’m totally thrilled!
We made a wonderful spectacle!
DP.024.0050:
Po-Po-Pokémon!\f
I want to become more like
a PIKACHU! Will you battle me?
DP.024.0053:
I need to get more into the
character of a Pokémon...
DP.024.0054:
Come on, let’s show off our Pokémon!
Let’s do battle, kiddo!
DP.024.0055:
Your spirit’s vibes... I can feel
you’ve got rock in your veins!\f
DP.024.0056:
Now, that is so lame.
You have to let your passion burn!
DP.024.0057:
Rock is about your spirit!
Battling is about spirit, too!\r
That’s why a battle is rock!
